approve_date.text: วันที่ลาออก

root.sql: select sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.member_group_no,tab.contract_memno ,tab.loan_contract_no) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date, (CASE lag(sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_memno,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_memno , sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.loan_contract_no ) WHEN sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_memno THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_memno, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_memno, sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_mem_name, sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.loan_contract_no, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_share_mem WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.resign_doc_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_memno = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result = '1' ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock > 0 ) and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no in ( select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ) /*WHERE*/ --AND ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date between '1/6/2020' and '30/6/2020' ) ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ASC, sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_memno ASC, sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.loan_contract_no ASC )tab

r_coll_resign_by_resign_date_nest.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no, (CASE lag(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) WHEN sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_memno, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code, (CASE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code WHEN '0' THEN '' ELSE pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) END) as resignation_approve_date,
sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resign_code, (select sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resign_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code) as resign_name, (CASE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code WHEN '0' THEN PKB_KTM.fp_get_collpermit_balance( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) ELSE 0 END) as c_coll FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) ) ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code DESC, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ASC
